question: What are the realistic financial scenarios for Xinpinmu, and how should investors think about its impact on PDD's valuation?

findings.claim: Li Lu's Himalaya Capital holds PDD as 4th largest position at 14.64% of $3.57B portfolio (Q4 2025 13F), having first purchased in Q2 2025 at 17.93% weighting; decline to 14.64% was from price depreciation, not selling
findings.data: Q2 2025: Himalaya Capital initiated PDD position, immediately 2nd largest at 17.93% of portfolio. Q3 2025: PDD at 18.85%, no trades. Q4 2025: PDD at 14.64% of $3.57B portfolio (4th largest). Decline from 18.85% to 14.64% due to PDD stock falling ~14% in Q4, not from selling. Portfolio: 44% in Alphabet (GOOG/GOOGL), then PDD. Li Lu's approach: value investing, scalable tech-enabled businesses, comfortable with volatility.

findings.claim: Duan Yongping's H&H International increased PDD position by ~34.55% in Q4 2025, adding ~3M shares during the price decline, making PDD 7.48% of his $17.49B portfolio (4th largest holding)
findings.data: Q4 2025: H&H total portfolio $17.49B (+19% from $14.7B in Q3). PDD at 7.48%, 4th largest. Increased PDD holdings by ~34.55%, adding ~3M shares — 'buying more as price fell, reflecting value investing philosophy'. Q2 2025: PDD at 7.86%, 3rd largest, added 900K+ shares (+11.72%). Q1 2025: PDD at 7.75M shares, $900M+, 3rd largest. Duan Yongping was angel investor in Pinduoduo. Quote: 'investing in PDD was because I like Huang Zheng' and 'China companies truly globalized: only Pinduoduo and Douyin'.
